metadata.name: usd_deposit_3m_envelope
metadata.description: Phase-1 smoke fixture: same deposit + expected outputs as deposit/usd_deposit_3m.json, but the discount curve is built via market_envelope rather than a materialized snapshot.
metadata.source_detail: Phase-1 smoke: same QuantLib-Python 1.42.1 oracle values as deposit/usd_deposit_3m.json; discount curve carried through initial_market with no calibration steps to produce byte-identical pricing Regenerated 2026-06-11 (docs/reviews/2026-06-09-core-quant-review.md): core npv now excludes flows on or before the valuation date (market-standard holder-view position value), so the T+0 initial -10MM notional exchange on the 2026-04-30 valuation date is no longer part of npv. New expected npv = prior QuantLib trade NPV (2877.927119438455) + 10,000,000 excluded initial flow at DF=1; equivalently QuantLib CashFlows.npv with includeSettlementDateFlows=False. deposit_par_rate and dv01 are unchanged (the t=0 flow has DF=1 and no rate sensitivity).
metadata.regen_command: manual QuantLib-Python oracle; see inputs.source_reference for reproduction formulas and intermediate values

plan.description: Phase-1 smoke envelope: carries the original usd_deposit_3m USD-OIS discount curve through initial_market for byte-identical pricing. No calibration steps.
